heading: Meet Tequila
description1:
At Tequilia Mockingbirds our goal is simple: to deliver a bespoke experience that is effortlessly enjoyable. We have reimagined the classic frozen margarita with a fresh wellness-inspired twist. 

Founders Carrie and Emma, have backgrounds rooted in health and wellness and have created a modern cocktail menu combining 100% premium blue agave tequila, natural syrups along with feel-good ingredients such as kombucha and kefir water. Our cocktails are designed to be cleaner, lighter and balanced. 
No more artificial nonsense. Just good clean fun!
description2:
Whether you are hosting a corporate event or want to bring festival energy to your private party or celebration. Tequila mockingbirds goal is simple to create a bespoke experience that  is effortlessly enjoyable.

Enquire today to discover how our frozen margaritas can be tailored to your occasion.
